name: quick-add-bookmark
description: Chrome extension: add bookmarks with full folder tree selection.

scripts.copy: cp manifest.json popup.html popup.css dist/ && cp -r icons dist/
scripts.build: npm run clean && mkdir -p dist && tsc --noEmit && esbuild src/popup.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/popup.js --format=iife --target=chrome115 && npm run copy
scripts.watch: mkdir -p dist && npm run copy && esbuild src/popup.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/popup.js --format=iife --target=chrome115 --watch
